flags.summary: In-state tuition at Brandeis University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.0k → $68.1k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Brandeis University are 46% above 6-year earnings ($53.0k → $77.2k).
